sprites_page_info: A complete collection of all Yuyuko sprites from official games, including bullet hell and fighting games. Includes gameplay sprites, character sprites from dialogue scenes, and more.
mangas_page_info: A collection of official manga panels featuring Yuyuko, primarily from 'Silent Sinner in Blue' and 'Foul Detective Satori'. A reader is available for more comfortable viewing.
fanarts_page_info: Section for exploring and uploading Yuyuko fan art. Tags implemented to help with searching and categorizing.
info_message_add_fan_art_span: You will be redirected to a section of the page where you can upload a new FanArt
info_message_add_fan_art_p_one: To upload FanArt, you first need:
info_message_add_fan_art_li_two: Image in the highest possible quality without subsequent modifications
info_message_add_fan_art_li_three: Original link to the FanArt and the user name of the authors
info_message_add_fan_art_p_two: After posting your FanArt, you must wait for the administrators to approve it so that all users can see it.
message_body_no_loged_in: You must logged in to upload FanArts
message_body_error_posting_unauthorized_: The link must come from a valid platform or be a direct image
message_body_error_not_enough_tags: The FanArt must have at least 5 tags
message_body_error_not_yuyuko_tag: The FanArt must include Yuyuko and her respective tag
info_message_no_artist_p_two: If there is no artist credited for the FanArt then continue, otherwise cancel to add an artist.
body_select_file_p_one: Get the image in best quality resolution posible
body_select_file_p_two: Try to get the highest quality image possible and from an original source, not a re-upload (e.g., other image banks).
select_clasification_p_one: Depending on what is shown in the fanart
select_clasification_p_two: <paragraph><bold>General:</bold> FanArt that shows nothing suggestive or explicit.</paragraph>
select_clasification_p_three: <paragraph><bold>Sensitive:</bold>FanArt that contains suggestive content but is not explicit. For example, swimsuits, underwear, or close-ups of breasts or ass.</paragraph>
select_clasification_p_four: <paragraph><bold>Explicit:</bold>Fan art that shows explicit content, whether sexual or gory.</paragraph>
body_enter_link_p_one: The link where the fanart image comes from
body_enter_link_p_two: The allowed links to publications are from the following pages: x.com, pixiv.net, reddit.com, deviantart.com, instagram.com.
body_enter_link_p_three: You can also enter a direct link to an image if the FanArt is not on a permitted page.
